  Before: tiktok_before_4.xml
  After : tiktok_after_4.xml

+ <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='yes' ?>
+ 
+ <hierarchy index="0" class="hierarchy" rotation="0" width="1080" height="2640">
+
